items.title: System Thinking + Practical Experience
items.description: Not just writing code, but thinking about system performance, scalability, and risk management from an overall architectural perspective.

items.title: Full-Stack + Cross-Platform
items.description: Backend in Node.js / NestJS / TypeScript, mobile in Flutter and React Native, web in React — able to take a product from zero to launch single-handedly.

items.title: AI Product Integration
items.description: Hands-on building of Claude-powered AI for matching, chat coaching, and content moderation, integrated into the product flow.

items.title: 0→1 Product Ownership & Business Sense
items.description: Defined a North Star Metric, ran competitive assessments, and made subtraction decisions — driving product trade-offs with data rather than just taking requirements.

items.title: Team Leadership & Influence
items.description: Experience managing 11 engineers, able to drive team technical decisions, establish standards, and improve system stability and quality.
